code: var socket=new WebSocket("ws://chat-3ekb.onrender.com/ws");var connect=function connect(cb){console.log("Connecting");socket.onopen=function(){console.log("Successfully Connected");};socket.onmessage=function(msg){console.log(msg);cb(msg);};socket.onclose=function(e){console.log("Socket Closed Connection: ",e);};socket.onerror=function(err){console.log("Socket error ",err);};};var sendMsg=function sendMsg(msg){console.log("sending msg: ",msg);socket.send(msg);};export{connect,sendMsg};
